{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Highgold Remnant
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Daji]] does not care about being a [[Highgold Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
